content:
💡 LLMRouter | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Optimizing LLM inference by intelligently routing queries to the most appropriate language model.
✨ Key Features: • Smart Routing: Automatically routes queries to the optimal LLM based on task complexity, cost, and performance.
📖 Summary: LLMRouter is an open-source Python library designed for intelligent routing of Large Language Model (LLM) inferences. It dynamically selects the most suitable LLM for a given query based on factors like complexity, cost, and performance, supporting over 16 diverse routing models and offering a unified CLI for training, inference, and chat.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
